answer: Pacific gold loyalty mobile-web checkout conversion dropped on August 4, 2026 because variant B of exp-2026-q3-loyalty-wallet-accelerator reused household_id in the wallet eligibility cache. That cache key crossed linked customer profiles and marked eligible profiles ineligible. The remediation is to disable variant B, purge wallet_eligibility_cache, and rebuild allocation by customer_profile_id.

facts.root_cause: loyalty wallet eligibility cache reused household_id across linked profiles
facts.remediation: disable variant B, purge wallet_eligibility_cache, and rebuild allocation by customer_profile_id
